Gambling and Games

Last updated: June 2026

Principle

Many people around the world find entertainment through games of chance. To support responsible gambling practices, gambling ads may not feature or appeal to young people. Ads showing gambling-like activities may also be limited in certain formats. See the Market-specific requirements section for more details.


We prioritize audience safety by restricting gambling and any monetized content directly encouraging gambling activities. Our policies aim to ensure a secure and positive environment for our community.


Policy

Our gambling and games ad policy covers several key areas including:

  • Certification requirements.

  • Details on geographic and age restrictions to ensure compliance across all markets.

  • Guidance on responsible gambling practices by setting expectations for how gambling should be promoted.

  • Content that is not allowed.

  • The different types of common gambling services.

Certification requirements

To advertise gambling services, you must go through our certification process. Find out more about our certification process at About the TikTok Industry Pilot Program. Certification ensures that we comply with local laws and our business standards. Our certification process requires you to provide documents that prove your licenses and legal compliance in your target market.


Geographic and age restrictions

  • Gambling ads are only allowed in specified markets where gambling is legal and when all local certifications and requirements are met.

  • Ads must be restricted to age-appropriate audiences; we do not allow gambling ads to be shown to minors.

  • Review the Market-specific requirements section for details on which markets allow gambling ads.


Promoting responsible gambling practices

Promote responsible gambling in your ads:

  • Include clear warnings about the risks; include all legally mandated gambling disclaimers and taglines.

  • Provide links to resources or hotlines for gambling addiction where possible.

  • Make sure that all promotions clearly define terms and conditions to help your audience feel confident and informed.


Content that is not allowed

We only allow ads that are in compliance with local laws governing gambling, or otherwise established as lawful in the delivery market.


Examples of what is not allowed:

  • Gambling ads that promote unlicensed or illegal gambling services.

  • Ads that mislead your audience with false offers.

  • Ads that fail to meet legal transparency requirements.

  • Ads that are directed at underage audiences.

  • Ads that feature underage people.


Types of gambling services

We group gambling services into two main categories:

  1. Gambling

    • Offline gambling

    • Online gambling

  2. Gambling-like activities

    • Non-casino games

    • Social casino games

    • Gambling information


Some services may have restrictions, so review the Market-specific requirements section for details on what's allowed in your target market.


  • Offline gambling: Offline gambling ads are the promotion of brick-and-mortar gambling venues. Examples:

    • Casinos

    • Gambling venues

  • Online gambling: Online gambling ads are the promotion of online wagering or betting, such as any online game of chance for money or other stakes, in any manner. Examples:

    • Online casinos: Digital platforms that offer casino-style games, such as slots, poker, roulette, bingo, and other real-money games (RMG).

    • Sports betting: The act of placing a wager on the outcome of a sporting event. Bets are typically placed through platforms known as sportsbooks, which accept wagers and pay out winnings based on the results.

  • Non-casino games: Non-casino game ads are the promotion of online games where participants can enter themselves into the game through payments, wagers, valuable items, or free submissions for a chance to win real money or other prizes. Examples:

    • Fantasy sports: A form of betting where participants contribute money to a shared pool, and winnings are distributed based on the outcomes of sports events, such as fantasy football or group betting pools.

    • Surprise-based products: Purchases that offer guaranteed rewards, where the exact reward is unknown, such as mystery boxes.

    • Sweepstakes or giveaways: Promotional events where participants can win prizes by chance, typically with no purchase required. These are product-focused promotions, not ongoing games of chance, and do not involve gambling or wagering money.

    • Lotteries: Games of chance that require payment to enter, where winnings are based entirely on chance, such as lottery tickets and scratchers.

    • Rewarded gaming: Skill-based games that offer real-money rewards based on participant performance rather than chance.

  • Social casino games: Virtual games that simulate traditional casino games, such as poker or slots, without monetary prizes. These games may include in-game purchases, such as coins or aesthetic items, but these have no real-world value and do not offer monetary rewards or wagering.

  • Gambling information: Content that provides insights, stats, or betting strategies designed to influence or improve betting outcomes.


Market-specific requirements

Requirements are subject to change; other restrictions may apply.

Algeria

Offline gambling is not allowed.


Online gambling is not allowed.


Non-casino games are not allowed.


Social casino games are not allowed.

Argentina

Offline gambling

  • Brick and mortar casinos are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.


Online gambling

  • Online casinos are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Sports betting is allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Examples of what is not allowed:

    • Horse racing

    • All other forms of online gambling ads


Non-casino games

  • Fantasy sports is allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Rewarded gaming is allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Examples of what is allowed:

      • Free skill-based games with money-out options

  • Lotteries are allowed if the following requirement are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Examples of what is not allowed:

    • Daily fantasy sports

    • All other forms of non-casino games are not allowed


Gambling Information is allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.


Australia

Offline gambling is not allowed.


Online gambling is allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Examples of what is allowed:

    • Membership or subscription-based giveaway ads

    • Sports betting

  • Examples of what is not allowed:

    • Bingo

    • Poker


Non-casino games are not allowed.


Social casino games are not allowed.

Austria

Offline gambling is not allowed.


Online gambling is not allowed.

  • Exception: Sports betting is allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.


Non-casino games are not allowed.

  • Exception: National lotteries are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Be owned, operated, or regulated by a government entity.

Social casino games are allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Games must be free-to-play (F2P); in-app purchases are allowed if there are no money-out options.

  • Do not involve real money or financial rewards. It should be clear from the presentation of the ad that players cannot win real money.


Azerbaijan

Offline gambling is not allowed.


Online gambling is not allowed.

Exception: Sports betting may be allowed if the following requirement is met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Have a local license issued by the respective authorities.


Non-casino games are not allowed.

  • Exception: National lotteries are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.


Social casino games are allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Games must be free-to-play (F2P); in-app purchases are allowed if there are no money-out options.

  • Do not involve real money or financial rewards. It should be clear from the presentation of the ad that players cannot win real money.


Bahrain

Offline gambling is not allowed.


Online gambling is not allowed.


Non-casino games are allowed if the following requirement is met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • National lotteries are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Be owned, operated, or regulated by a government entity.


Social casino games are not allowed.

Bangladesh

Offline gambling is not allowed.


Online gambling is not allowed.


Non-casino games are not allowed.


Social casino games are not allowed.

Belarus

Offline gambling is not allowed.

  • Social casino games are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads

    • Games must be free-to-play (F2P) and in-app purchases are allowed; money-out options are not allowed

    • Games must not involve real money or financial rewards and it should be clear from the presentation of the ad that players cannot win real money

  • Sports betting, fantasy sports, and daily fantasy sports are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads

    • Must have a local license issued by the respective authorities

    • Examples of what is not allowed:

      • Aggregate or affiliate sites that promote gambling-related content

      • Educational materials such as tutorials or e-books

      • Promotional products such as vouchers or bonus codes

  • Online casino games are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Have a local license issued by the respective authorities

  • Examples of casino-related ads that are allowed:

    • Slot machine

    • Cylinder game (roulette)

    • Totalisator

  • Examples of what is not allowed:

    • Electronic interactive games

    • Lotteries

    • Promotional (advertising) games

    • Activities of foreign gambling establishments


Belgium

Offline gambling is not allowed.


Online gambling is not allowed.


Non-casino games are not allowed.

Exception: National lotteries are allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Be owned, operated, or regulated by a government entity.


Social casino games are allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Games must be free-to-play (F2P); in-app purchases are not allowed.

  • Do not involve real money or financial rewards. It should be clear from the presentation of the ad that players cannot win real money.


Bolivia

Offline gambling

  • Brick and mortar casinos are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.


Online gambling

  • Online casinos are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Sports betting is allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Examples of what is not allowed:

    • Horse racing

    • All other forms of online gambling ads


Non-casino games

  • Fantasy sports are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Rewarded gaming is allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Examples of what is allowed:

      • Free skill-based games with money-out options

  • Lotteries are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

Examples of what is not allowed:

  • Daily fantasy sports

  • All other forms of non-casino games are not allowed.


Social casino games are allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Games must be free-to-play (F2P); in-app purchases are allowed if there are no money-out options.

  • Do not involve anything with real-world value or financial rewards. It should be clear from the presentation of the ad that players cannot win anything with real-world value.


Gambling Information is allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.


Brazil

Offline gambling is not allowed.


Online gambling

  • Online casinos are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Sports betting is allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Examples of what is not allowed:

    • Horse racing

    • All other forms of online gambling ads


Non-casino games

  • Fantasy sports are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Rewarded gaming is allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Examples of what is allowed:

      • Free skill-based games with money-out options

  • Lotteries are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • National lottery: Only "Caixa Econômica Federal" is allowed to advertise.

    • State-level lotteries: allowed to advertise.

    • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Examples of what is not allowed:

    • Daily fantasy sports

    • All other forms of non-casino games


Social casino games are allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Games must be free-to-play (F2P); in-app purchases are allowed if there are no money-out options.

  • Do not involve anything with real-world value or financial rewards. It should be clear from the presentation of the ad that players cannot win anything with real-world value.


Gambling Information is allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

Social casino games are not allowed.

Bulgaria

Online gambling is not allowed.

  • Exception: Sports Betting allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads


Non-casino games are not allowed.

  • Exception: National lotteries are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Be owned, operated, or regulated by a government entity.

Cambodia

Exception: National lotteries are allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Be owned, operated, or regulated by a government entity.


Social casino games are allowed if the following requirement is met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Do not involve real money or financial rewards. It should be clear from the presentation of the ad that players cannot win real money.


Canada

Offline gambling is allowed if the following requirement is met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.


Online gambling

  • Online casinos are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Examples of casino-related ads that are allowed:

      • Online casinos

      • Bingo

  • Sports betting is allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Examples of what is not allowed:

    • Sites that contain or redirect to online gambling content

    • Aggregate or affiliate sites that promote gambling-related content

    • Educational materials such as tutorials or e-books

    • Promotional products such as vouchers or bonus codes

    • Poker

    • Poker odds calculating software

    • All other forms of online gambling


Non-casino games

  • Fantasy sports and daily fantasy sports are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Lotteries are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Be owned, operated, or regulated by a government entity.

  • Rewarded gaming is allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Examples of what is allowed:

      • Free skill-based games with money-out options

  • Examples of what is not allowed:

    • All other forms of non-casino games


Social casino games are allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Do not involve anything with real-world value or financial rewards. It should be clear from the presentation of the ad that players cannot win anything with real-world value.

  • Games must be free-to-play (F2P); in-app purchases are allowed if there are no money-out options.


Gambling information is allowed if the following requirement is met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Examples of gambling information products and services that are allowed:

    • Betting tips

    • Odd prediction

    • Gambling course aids

  • Examples of gambling information products and services that are not allowed:

    • All other forms of gambling information


Chile

Offline gambling

  • Brick and mortar casinos are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.


Online gambling is not allowed


Non-casino games

  • Fantasy sports are allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Rewarded gaming is allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Examples of what is allowed:

  • Lotteries are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

Examples of what is not allowed:

  • Daily fantasy sports

  • All other forms of non-casino games are not allowed.


Social casino games are allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Games must be free-to-play (F2P); in-app purchases are allowed if there are no money-out options.

  • Do not involve anything with real-world value or financial rewards. It should be clear from the presentation of the ad that players cannot win anything with real-world value.


Gambling Information is allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.


Colombia

Offline gambling

  • Brick and mortar casinos are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.


Online gambling

  • Sports betting is allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads

  • Online casinos are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads

Examples of what is not allowed:

  • Horse racing

  • All other forms of online gambling ads


Non-casino games

  • Fantasy sports are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Rewarded gaming is allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Examples of what is allowed:

      • Free skill-based games with money-out options

  • Lotteries are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

Examples of what is not allowed:

  • Daily fantasy sports

  • All other forms of non-casino games are not allowed.

  • Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Do not involve anything with real-world value or financial rewards. It should be clear from the presentation of the ad that players cannot win anything with real-world value.

Exception: Licensed Pachinko and Pachislot businesses in Japan may be eligible to advertise if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Be a licensed Japanese operator or manufacturer and comply with all applicable local laws and TikTok advertising policies.

  • Casinos

  • Mahjong

  • Games must be free-to-play (F2P); in-app purchases are allowed if there are no money-out options.

  • Do not involve real money or financial rewards. It should be clear from the presentation of the ad that players cannot win real money.

United States

Offline gambling

  • Brick and mortar casinos are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.


Online gambling

  • Casinos are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Examples of casino-related ads that are allowed:

      • Online casinos

      • Bingo

  • Sports betting is allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Examples of what is not allowed:

    • Horse racing sites that contain or redirect to online gambling content

    • Aggregate or affiliate sites that promote gambling-related content

    • Educational materials such as tutorials or e-books

    • Promotional products such as vouchers or bonus codes

    • Poker

    • Software, such as poker odds calculators

    • All other forms of online gambling


Non-casino games

  • Fantasy sports and daily fantasy sports are allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Rewarded gaming is allowed if the following requirement is met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Examples of what is allowed:

      • Free skill-based games with money-out options

  • Lotteries are allowed if the following requirements are met:

    • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

    • Be owned, operated, or regulated by a government entity.

  • Examples of what is not allowed:

    • All other forms of non-casino games are not allowed.


Social casino games are allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Do not involve anything with real-world value or financial rewards. It should be clear from the presentation of the ad that players cannot win anything with real-world value.

  • Games must be free-to-play (F2P); in-app purchases are allowed if there are no money-out options.


Gambling information is allowed if the following requirements are met:

  • Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

  • Examples of gambling information products and services that are allowed:

    • Betting tips

    • Odd prediction

    • Gambling course aids

  • Examples of gambling information products and services that are not allowed:

    • All other forms of gambling information
